summary: Add VS Code-like git status decoration to the rust-diffforge read-only workspace file explorer when the workspace is inside a git repository.

review_items.summary: Directory listing and file read responses include optional git status metadata derived from a bounded local git status command when git is available.
The Files view colors file and folder names by git status, including green untracked files and yellow modified files, and shows the selected file status beside the preview metadata.
Git status probing remains read-only, bounded by timeout, and scoped to the resolved workspace root.
No database schema, migration, SQL policy, or data access change is required.

patches.summary: Add optional git status discovery to workspace directory listings and file reads.
Render VS Code-like git status colors and badges in the Files view.

compatibility.notes: The change is local to the authenticated desktop Files view and falls back to no git decoration when git is unavailable or the workspace is not in a repository.
